response.justification: Bogdan has a broad, genuine engineering career spanning ~20 years with recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is directionally relevant. However, the role targets a Director-level individual contributor who can set AI strategy, advise enterprise customers, and provide recognized external thought leadership — a profile Bogdan does not yet match. His titles have been Senior/Staff IC throughout, with no demonstrated executive advisory, org-level technical leadership, or scaled AI platform ownership. The preferred advanced degree in AI is absent, and his AI exposure is limited to the last year in a current role rather than a sustained track record of AI product delivery.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, showing genuine hands-on engagement with agentic AI tooling
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and history of working in early-stage companies demonstrates initiative and product ownership beyond pure execution
concerns: No evidence of Director-level scope: no org leadership, no executive stakeholder advisory, no demonstrated ability to set technical strategy at the company or customer level
AI expertise is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward); the role requires recognized, multi-year expertise with demonstrable AI products or platforms built and shipped at scale

No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related field, and no conference publications, patents, or external thought-leadership artifacts that signal the 'recognized expertise' the role explicitly calls for
